mapper.update: update production_order set delete_flag=1 where id=#{id}
update production_order set status=41 where production_order.delete_flag!=1 and id=#{id}
update production_order set status=40 where production_order.delete_flag!=1 and id=#{id}
update production_order set status=39 where production_order.delete_flag!=1 and id=#{id}

UPDATE task_list SET task_code = #{taskCode}, task_name = #{taskName}, workstation_code = #{workstationCode}, workstation_name = #{workstationName}, workflow_id = #{workflowId}, process_id = #{processId}, scheduled_quantity = #{scheduledQuantity}, produced_quantity = #{producedQuantity}, start_time = #{startTime}, production_duration = #{productionDuration}, estimated_completion_time = #{estimatedCompletionTime}, display_color = #{displayColor}, production_order_code = #{productionOrderCode} WHERE id = #{id};
update task_list set task_list.delete_flag=1 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: select * from sys_dict_data WHERE sys_dict_data.delete_flag!=1 and sys_dict_data.id=#{status}
select * from sys_dict_data WHERE sys_dict_data.delete_flag!=1 and sys_dict_data.id=#{status}
select * FROM customer where customer.delete_flag!=1 and customer.code=#{code}
select * from material where material.delete_flag!=1 and material.code=#{code}
select unit.* from unit join material ON unit.id=material.unit_id where material.delete_flag!=1 and unit.delete_flag!=1 and material.code=#{code}

SELECT production_order.* ,material.name as materialName, customer.name as customerName FROM production_order JOIN material ON material.`code`=production_order.material_code LEFT JOIN customer ON customer.`code`=production_order.customer_code where production_order.delete_flag!=1 and material.delete_flag!=1 AND (customer.delete_flag!=1 OR customer.delete_flag IS NULL) and production_order.id=#{id}
SELECT * FROM supplier WHERE (supplier.delete_flag != 1 or supplier.delete_flag is null) and supplier.code=#{code}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO production_order ( production_order_code, production_order_name, production_order_type, production_order_source, material_code, production_order_quantity, request_date, status,
order_code,
customer_code,
supplier_code,
parent_id,
remark,
) VALUES ( #{productionOrderCode}, #{productionOrderName}, #{productionOrderType}, #{productionOrderSource}, #{materialCode}, #{productionOrderQuantity}, #{requestDate}, #{status},
#{orderCode},
#{customerCode},
#{supplierCode},
#{parentId},
#{remark},
)
mapper.select: select * from production_order where production_order.delete_flag!=1 and production_order.production_order_code=#{code} limit 1
select * FROM material join material_bom ON material.id=material_bom.parent_material_id where material.delete_flag!=1 and material_bom.delete_flag!=1 and material.code=#{code}
select * from material where material.delete_flag!=1 and material.id=#{id}
select * from production_order WHERE production_order.delete_flag!=1 and production_order.id=#{id}
SELECT * FROM workflow JOIN work_flow_product ON workflow.id=work_flow_product.workflow_id where work_flow_product.product_code=#{code}
select * from process left JOIN work_flow_process ON work_flow_process.process_id=process.id where work_flow_process.workflow_id=#{id}
SELECT * from task_list WHERE task_list.delete_flag!=1 and task_list.workflow_id=#{workflowId} and task_list.process_id=#{processId} and production_order_code=#{code}
select * from task_list WHERE task_list.delete_flag!=1 and task_list.id=#{id}
select * from task_list WHERE task_list.delete_flag!=1 and task_list.task_code=#{code}
